durable_slice: Add an independent post-run promotion-consistency audit bound to the exact deployment workflow head commit and retained artifact name.

verification.deployment_evidence: No Cloudflare deployment or audit workflow execution is claimed.

limits: The audit runs after the primary workflow and therefore does not yet fail closed before primary evidence finalization.

A consistency verdict authenticates bounded record agreement only; it does not establish scientific truth, diagnosis, or treatment efficacy.
